subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: Know and realize the greatness of the Cause into which you have entered. Look not at the present. The day will come when there will not be a house which does not contain a believer in this Revelation.
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @growth of the Cause, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God
